steps.title: Find the cost per sundae
steps.content:
We're given that 19 sundaes cost $64.60. Divide to find the cost per sundae:
$$\frac{64.60}{19} = 3.40$$
Each sundae costs \$3.40.

steps.title: Build the equation from the cost components
steps.content:
• Cones: $x$ cones at $1.40 each = $1.40x$
  • Sundaes: $y$ sundaes at $3.40 each = $3.40y$
  • Total cost: $1.40x + 3.40y = 85.60$

That matches choice D — D is correct.
